revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿六]][[zh:七月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿六]][[zh:七月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿六]][[zh:七月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿六]][[zh:七月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 26|qq=July 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} , {{ill|1614|en|1614|qid=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} accused the inscription "国家安康" (Peace to the Nation) on the Great Buddha Bell of {{ill|Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)|en|Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)|qid=Q1045971|lt=Hōkō-ji|1=Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)}} , built by [[Toyotomi Hideyori]]{{efn|Toyotomi Hideyori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , of disrespecting the Tokugawa name. This dispute contributed to the outbreak of the {{ill|Siege of Osaka|en|Siege of Osaka|qid=Q475780|lt=Siege of Osaka|1=Siege of Osaka}} . * Year 8 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} , {{ill|1825|en|1825|qid=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} ) – The play {{ill|Tōkaidō Yotsuya Kaidan|ja|東海道四谷怪談|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Yotsuya Kaidan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 四谷怪談|1=Yotsuya Kaidan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1339373}} , written by {{ill|Tsuruya Nanboku IV|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruya Nanboku IV|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1675237}} , premiered at the {{ill|Nakamura-za|en|Nakamura-za|qid=Q1154952|lt=Nakamura-za|1=Nakamura-za}} theater in Edo. * Year 1 of {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}} , {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} ) – British ambassador {{ill|Rutherford Alcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rutherford Alcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2640367}} became the first foreigner to climb {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|qid=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji|1=Mount Fuji}} .
== Deaths == * Year 6 of {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tengyō|1=Tengyō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|943|en|943|qid=Q24179|lt=943|1=943}} ) – {{ill|Prince Motoyoshi|en|Prince Motoyoshi|qid=Q620267|lt=Prince Motoyoshi|1=Prince Motoyoshi}} , poet (b. {{ill|890|en|890|qid=Q30481|lt=890|1=890}} ). * Year 18 of {{ill|Bunmei|en|Bunmei|qid=Q1193544|lt=Bunmei (era)|1=Bunmei}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1486|en|1486|qid=Q6646|lt=1486|1=1486}} ) – {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|en|Ōta Dōkan|qid=Q386144|lt=Ōta Dōkan|1=Ōta Dōkan}} , samurai and military strategist (b. {{ill|1432|en|1432|qid=Q6349|lt=1432|1=1432}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}} , {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} ) – {{ill|Yui Shōsetsu|en|Yui Shōsetsu|qid=Q8060473|lt=Yui Shōsetsu|1=Yui Shōsetsu}} , military strategist and leader of the {{ill|Keian Uprising|en|Keian Uprising|qid=Q6383559|lt=Keian Uprising|1=Keian Uprising}} (b. {{ill|1605|en|1605|qid=Q6741|lt=1605|1=1605}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)|1=Shōtoku (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}} , {{ill|1713|en|1713|qid=Q6873|lt=1713|1=1713}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|en|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|qid=Q843299|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimichi|1=Tokugawa Yoshimichi}} , 4th lord of {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|qid=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain|1=Owari Domain}} (b. {{ill|1689|en|1689|qid=Q7674|lt=1689|1=1689}} ). * Year 5 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ) – {{ill|Asano Nagamichi|en|Asano Nagamichi|qid=Q11557433|lt=Asano Nagakoto|1=Asano Nagamichi}} , 11th lord of {{ill|Hiroshima Domain|en|Hiroshima Domain|qid=Q1141203|lt=Hiroshima Domain|1=Hiroshima Domain}} (b. {{ill|1812|en|1812|qid=Q6933|lt=1812|1=1812}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|25|7|27|6|26|8|7|0726|qq=}}
